agents.name: Implementation Agent
agents.description: Implementation Agent with PR queue gate — runs every 2 hours, skips if PR queue is full

agents.name: Code Review Agent
agents.description: Code Review Agent — reviews PRs every 2 hours

agents.name: PR Merger Agent
agents.description: Auto-merge PRs that have passing CI and approved reviews — every 2 hours

agents.name: CI Triage Agent
agents.description: CI Triage Agent — hourly with skip-if-green guard

agents.name: Merge Conflict Resolver
agents.description: Merge Conflict Resolver — serialized (1 PR/run), every 2 hours, with cascade risk detection

agents.name: PR Review Responder
agents.description: Respond to unresolved PR review comments on agent-authored PRs

agents.name: Stale Branch Janitor
agents.description: Stale Branch Janitor — daily cleanup of stale branches and PRs

agents.name: Recovery Controller
agents.description: Self-healing agent that detects unhealthy swarm conditions and executes remediation playbooks

agents.name: Risk Escalation Agent
agents.description: Assesses cumulative swarm risk, gates dangerous operations, escalates to humans when needed

agents.name: Governance Monitor
agents.description: Governance Agent — combined governance monitoring + policy effectiveness analysis (daily)

agents.name: Planning Agent
agents.description: Planning Agent — daily sprint planning with strategy document ingestion and swarm state updates

agents.name: Observability Agent
agents.description: Observability Agent — daily SRE analysis with swarm health monitoring and shared state updates

agents.name: Backlog Steward
agents.description: Backlog Steward — daily ROADMAP expansion, capped at 3 issues/run

agents.name: Documentation Maintainer
agents.description: Documentation Maintainer — daily docs sync with strategy staleness detection

agents.name: Product Agent
agents.description: Product Agent — daily product health and roadmap alignment review

agents.name: Progress Controller
agents.description: Tracks roadmap phase completion, detects transitions, prevents backlog expansion

agents.name: Repo Hygiene Agent
agents.description: Detect stale issues, solved issues, and undiscovered work

agents.name: Retrospective Agent
agents.description: Analyzes failure patterns, extracts heuristics, publishes weekly retrospective with lessons learned

agents.name: Test Agent
agents.description: Test Agent — daily test health review and coverage analysis

agents.name: Test Generation Agent
agents.description: Generate tests for untested source modules (weekly)

agents.name: Security Audit Agent
agents.description: Security Agent — combined dependency audit + source code scan (weekly Sunday)

agents.name: Architect Agent
agents.description: Review open PRs for architectural concerns

agents.name: CI/CD Hardening Agent
agents.description: Weekly CI/CD hardening audit — action pinning, permissions, supply chain, governance integration

agents.name: Merged PR Auditor
agents.description: Weekly audit of PRs merged in the last 7 days for overlooked risks

agents.name: Infrastructure Health Agent
agents.description: Daily infrastructure and SDLC pipeline health check

agents.name: Marketing Content Agent
agents.description: Weekly content generation — drafts LinkedIn posts, Twitter/X posts, and blog outlines
